body.title: Vendor SWADL into repo + smoke run
body.result: Integrated via editable install rather than vendoring (Akien is swadl author; vendoring would fork upstream). pip install -e /home/akien/dev/src/swadl into Igor's venv — swadl-0.2.0. SWADL.engine modules import cleanly. Overview doc at lab/design_docs/swadl_overview.md. Commit 8ded14c7.
body.description:
Pure housekeeping — CC does this alone. Prerequisite for everything else in T-igor-as-user-epic.

## Scope
- Pull github.com/akienm/swadl into wild_igor/tools/swadl/ (vendored, not pip — so Igor can introspect source)
- Resolve deps (pywinauto, selenium) into requirements.txt
- Smoke test: open a blank browser, close it, confirm no errors
- Write a one-page 'what SWADL is' note at lab/design_docs/swadl_overview.md for future CC sessions

## Related
- Parent: T-igor-as-user-epic
- Unblocks: T-swadl-concepts-in-graph
